allow: PowerShell(.\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pip install --quiet fastapi "uvicorn[standard]" "pydantic>=2.6" httpx python-dotenv)

PowerShell($cfg = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/demo/config; $cfg | ConvertTo-Json; $q = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:8000/api/query -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"text":"anything at all"}'; "mode=$\($q.mode\) took_ms=$\($q.took_ms\) candidates=$\($q.candidates.Count\)"; $q.candidates | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.fit.fit_score\)  $\($_.founder.name\)  [$\($_.graph_context -join '; '\)]" })

PowerShell([Console]::OutputEncoding = [Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $g = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/globe; $g | ForEach-Object { "#$\($_.rank\) $\($_.name\) \($\($_.lat\),$\($_.lng\)\) score=$\($_.score\) conf=$\($_.confidence\)" }; $s = Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/story/f-jonas-keller; "story beats: $\($s.founder.story_beats.Count\), scorecard conf: $\($s.founder.scorecard.confidence\), er_conf: $\($s.founder.entity_resolution_confidence\)"; "note: $\($s.founder.scorecard.verify_offline_note\)"; $quote = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri http://localhost:8000/api/quote -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"name":"Test VC","email":"vc@fund.com","firm":"Fund I"}'; $quote; try { Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/api/founder/nope } catch { "404 check: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })

PowerShell($dst = "C:\\Users\\bibek\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\VC Brain\\frontend\\public\\countries.geojson"; $urls = @\("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vasturiano/react-globe.gl/master/example/datasets/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson","https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvkelso/natural-earth-vector/master/geojson/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -OutFile $dst -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; break } catch { Write-Host "failed: $u" } }; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { $len=\(Get-Item $dst\).Length; "downloaded $len bytes"; $j = Get-Content $dst -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "features: $\($j.features.Count\)"; "sample ADMIN: $\($j.features[0].properties.ADMIN\) / name: $\($j.features[0].properties.name\)" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\bibek\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\VC Brain\\frontend\\public\\countries.geojson" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $want = @\("United Kingdom","Germany","France","Sweden","Italy","Netherlands","Switzerland"\); foreach \($w in $want\) { $f = $j.features | Where-Object { $_.properties.ADMIN -eq $w }; if \($f\) { "OK  $w -> name=$\($f.properties.name\)" } else { "MISS $w" } })
